source_declaration.name: Multiset.card_map
source_declaration.source_snippet:
@[simp]
theorem card_map (f : α → β) (s) : card (map f s) = card s :=
  Quot.inductionOn s fun _ => length_map _

source_declaration.declaration_line: protected theorem Antitone.comp (hg : Antitone g) (hf : Antitone f) : Monotone (g ∘ f) :=
source_declaration.name: Antitone.comp
source_declaration.source_snippet:
protected theorem Antitone.comp (hg : Antitone g) (hf : Antitone f) : Monotone (g ∘ f) :=
  fun _ _ h ↦ hg (hf h)

hydrated_mathlib_context.why_needed: May be needed to prove antitone of the padded function if the original partition is decreasing.
